description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The lower level is predominantly white with large, grid-style windows and a main entry door, while the upper level features a wood-textured facade and additional windows. The house includes a spacious balcony on the upper floor, partially enclosed by glass railings, and a private backyard area with outdoor seating and a hot tub. A car is parked adjacent to the house, and the property is bordered by a dark privacy fence with greenery along one side. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on open spaces and natural light. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood paneling.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, wood-accented upper floor, large windows, and a private backyard with outdoor amenities. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, light-filled spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wood-paneled upper facade, and a car parked beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper balcony, glass railings, and the backyard area with outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, hot tub, outdoor dining area, and extensive window arrangements on both floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the continuation of the balcony and backyard fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-style and picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a modern door with glass panels, no porch, and a minimal overhang; entry is flush with the facade.
